response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of broad software development experience and clear technical leadership credentials including mentorship, public talks, and open-source projects. His current Stripe role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators, which maps directly onto a named key technology in the JD. However, the role demands 8+ years of production AI experience, and his GenAI work is concentrated in roughly the past year. Python is absent from his resume and skills list despite being a primary language in the JD, and there is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI—all of which are core requirements.
strengths: Active MCP framework and agentic workflow development at Stripe directly matches a named key technology in the job description
15+ years of engineering across distributed systems, cloud (AWS CDK), and full-stack work demonstrates the breadth expected at Staff level
Proven technical mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source library authorship
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list despite being a primary language explicitly required by the JD
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalents)
GenAI-specific production experience appears limited to approximately one year at Stripe, well short of the 8-year minimum

key_factors.factor: No RAG or vector DB experience
MCP and agentic workflow work at Stripe
